title: polypodium subtaeniatum
intro: Polypodium subtaeniatum, also known as the Polypodium fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family, commonly found in Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Polypodium subtaeniatum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in the form of powder or capsules in modern herbal preparations.
